channel.title: /biz/ Active (filtered, with replies)
channel.description: Filtered out: general, gme, bbbyq. OP + first 3 replies + last 30 replies.

item.title: Chainlink explicitly mentioned by SWIFT — 71 replies — 122.4/hr
item.content:encoded:
Chainlink explicitly mentioned by SWIFT

Open thread • Replies: 71 • Updated: 2026-03-11 13:16 UTC

OP

You may all sperg the fuck out now. Never fucking selling.

Early replies (first 3)

61964214
>ZOG Swift intern casually poops LLM-generated report
>CHAINCHINK IS BOOMING BROS
actually delusional. $9.

61964222
don't care don't care
price price price
you lost the game, stinkies
PERIOD
stop trying to reclaim some shred of lost dignity. just take the heckin' L

61964252
>>61964222
i dont really give a fuck about link but this image disgusts me

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

61965612
>>61965595
>That was a year ago not five
Ok FUCKING NIGGER, what about this...
2022:
https://chainlinktoday.com/chainlink-and-swift-announce-ccip-proof-of-concept-at-smartcon-2022/
>muh proof of concept
>muh pilots
>muh trials
NOTHING EVER HAPPENS.

61965622
>>61965612
I created this thread and even I will admit we’ve been saying “this is the year” for awhile that guy is just egging you on. But I gotta be real with you man….. this is the year.

61965623
>>61965612
Well that was a proof of concept, which is now not a proof of concept as of recently. Boy you're kinda slow.....

61965643
>>61965622
>this is the year
Proof? Nobody even knows... not even Sergey.
>>61965623
I accept your concession.

61965673
>>61965643
Im glad you accept I am objectively correct. Now run along and keep those layers safe.

61965831
>>61964199
Bullish for XRP.

61965875
>>61965831
only if youre retarded though.

61965911
>>61965595
but news don't matter for the price bitch
owned owned owned
rekt rekt rekt
#stinky

61965956
$700 on link today. Will I make it in 30 years?

61966013
>>61965956
$700 is way too little you fucking pussy. You need to put in like $100k to stand a chance. Make it number is $4M.

61966021
>9
that's nice i guess...

61966283
>>61964222
you hold link

61966300
>>61966283
have sex

61966478
>>61966300
Have blowjobs

61966508
>>61964199
UH OH STINKIES
RIPPLE CHADS ARE TAKING THEIR MONEY ELSEWHERE!

61966797
>>61964199
>explicitly mentioned by swift
>link @ $8.88
fuck this timeline

61967774
Hows that flippening coming along boys?
Still seething at number 3?
CCIP revenue doing big numbers?
The airdrops made you a lot of money?
The reserve slowly getting filled?
The payment abstraction layer abstracting you hard earned money away?
I see the circulating supply still steadily increasing. Looks like 2030 is right on track.

61967788
>please be excited for another trial in 2017+9 pls pls pls!!!!!

61967953
>>61964222
Is this a bot?

61968088
>>61965041
kek

61968094
>>61966508
do you think he poured hot chocolate on his chinese wife, as a "fuck you" to swift?

61968216
>>61964199
Price

61968298
>>61965461
we're pretty close. xStocks is the tech Kraken will be using to tokenize normal stocks from nasdaq, after nasdaq has entered partnership with them
Now guess what, 2025

>https://backed.fi/news-updates/xstocks-are-going-live-tokenized-stocks-for-the-defi-era

another one here:

OKX got a $25b buyout from NYSE mother company intercontinental exchange as strategic partnership.

Now guess what:

X Layer, the official eth L2 from OKX joined chainlink scale program in 2025. Basically, they agree to use chainlinks services for their stack for free usage of those services (CCIP, functions, automations, price feeds)

>https://web3.okx.com/learn/chainlink-xlayer

Not to mention chainlinks direct partnerships of publishing trade data of IC and NYSE.

Now look further. Competitors start using the same tools (Chainlink) because if you don't you get left behind, the biggest dex on solana adopts chainlink as their official oracle service for their upcoming prediction market, while polymarket has also adopted chainlink as official oracle service already months ago.

61968311
>>61968298
news like these will keep coming and before you know it, everything loops back to chainlink in some way.

I'm not saying ever service will use the FULL stack of services chainlink provides. Some might only use the price feeds.

others might only use functions or ccip

What matters is that chainlink put itself in a position, where most companies will adopt it out of principle. Imagine you want to spin up a company that wants to have the edge in one of those things (interoperability, speed, etc) but you have to sacrifice other things because you can't be the best in everything. So you fallback on using a proven company (chainlink) for the rest, it reduces complexity and you can focus on your own niche. Win win for everyone

61968320
>>61965559
This needs to be updated to swift runs endless pocs, never charges a fee and staking doesn't happen.
>$8

61968327
>>61968298
>>61968311
>Ctrl+f "LINK token functionality in all this technobabble
>0 results
can we finally ban linkjeets

61968340
So when will Chainlink become a publically traded company people can invest in?

61968358
>>61968340
CL employees have officially stated that there is no IPO happening, buy LINK token

61968601
>>61968340
they get equity in link token

61968616
>>61964682
how the fuck does swift even make money it feels like the biggest vaporwave company to ever exist..a big paper tiger.

item.title: Housing Crash Delayed yet again — 53 replies — 85.4/hr
item.content:encoded:
Housing Crash Delayed yet again

Open thread • Replies: 53 • Updated: 2026-03-11 13:14 UTC

OP

Uh oh Rentoids!
>US Existing Home Sales Bounced In February As Mortgage Rates Tumbled
>Consensus was for a modest 0.8% MoM decline in February (again despite an ongoing drop in mortgage rates) but sales actually surprised to the upside, rising 1.7% MoM.
>with mortgage rates at their lowest since 2022, existing home sales look set to continue to improve
>The NAR report showed the median selling price rose 0.3% from a year earlier
>Market analysts see home sales climbing this year, with estimates ranging from 1.7% to 14%, according to a survey by Bloomberg late last year.

But yeah, that housing market crash is coming any day now, keep renting until then! Just two more weeks!

Early replies (first 3)

61963664
Fuck you I will get a home for 4 ounces of silver soon and you will beg me for it

61963697
getting ready to buy my 2nd rental
you guys can go on about the inevitable crash
rent is due 1st of the month

61963806
Housing will just keep going up and it’s not gonna stop, if you are priced out now then you are priced out forever
There will be no housing crash, most homeowners are cash positive on their mortgages unlike the 2008 crash

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

61966694
>>61966685
to account for demolition and clean up that is

61966744
>>61964458
>So the real reason you might want to own something is to have skin in the game which opens up opportunities to have access to real wealth.
This is a nonsense word salad. You sound like a black person trying to sell me an entrepreneur course.

61966958
>>61963973
So that's a no.
>>61966064
Your rent has stayed the same or gone up since you moved in. Seethe.

61966988
>>61966064
Same here. Its hilarious how desperate the concrete wood boomer box ponzi players have become. And the trend is clear cut for the next 2 centuries

61967006
>>61966958
No nigger, the rental market has become extremely competitive. The boom boom and the communist banks that sit on unsellable akyias are in desperate need for cashflow due to having front run on high interests a demand that never materialized and isn't going to materialize for 2 centuries. The ponzi is over, the collateral value of the ponzis going to back to equilibrium.
The USA, Canada,the UK and Europe are about to have their own everlast

61967256
>>61967006
sure, just wait two more weeks until you can a cheap house, just keep waiting, any year now it will happen, just keep renting that tiny apartment while other people live in homes

61967274
>>61967256
thats what boomers have been telling me for years but i kept my down payment in this instead

61967291
>>61963994
Pretty much. The government is the landlord and everyone is renting from them.

61967323
>>61967256
You really don't get it. In 2025 the core boomer bulge went from keeping the ponzi afloat being retarded slaves paying monthly into ponzis to expecting for the rest of their life pay outs from bankrupt ponzis. Enjoy the end of 54 years of pyramid scheming on a ponzi

61967353
>>61967006
>about to
>experts suggest
>2 more weeks
Just make sure your rent is on time this month anon, there is a 100 dollar late fee.

61967370
>>61967353
You don't need to be an "expert" to understand that with core boomers leaving the slave market and the slave market losing 1/3 of the major slaves paying monthly into rehypothecation ponzis collateralized by a big chunk with concrete wood boxes, and now expecting fixed incomes from the respective ponzi companies, without keeping the ponzi collateral stable, that the income needs to come from somewhere. Its de-accumulatiom time, on a market that hasn't the bid to absorb the necessary sales to generate the cashflow necessary to honor the retarded ponzi schemes boomboom and many Xers and Xillenial alike fell for.

The money is gone, no buyers, collateral value going toward 0

61967371
>>61963604
>0.3% yearly return
>meanwhile, property taxes increased 8%
kek baggies

61967379
>>61967370
And btw, it has been gone for 35 years

61967385
>>61967371
>Gets passed onto the renter
Kek, goyim dealing in the real world.
>>61967379
>just 35 more years

61967391
>>61967371
Its hilarious and the smart baggies that are lucid to the storm that started in late 25 and is going to be a 30-40 year, considering the demographic deflation maybe 200 year storm, to lower the rents to be competitive, to generate some cashflow from depreciating asset they know they won't find buyers for, while the stupid baggies are neither going to find buyers nor cashflow.

And even funnier, its known for anybody that paid attention that this was going to happen deterministically since the mid 90s

61967400
>>61967385
Retard, I spent less then 100k on shelter for 20 years, while the retarded boomer I scammed cannot increase rent but has to lower it depending on market valuation. He is going to make a loss until he is dead

61967483
>>61963917
>Housing has been flat for 2 years now

Its been flat since Q4 2021

61967488
>>61967483
And now lets take the monetary base inflation into consideration, falling for 5 years straight

61967789
>>61967274
cash always does better in stocks/crypto

real estate is just done as a leverage play

you put 3% down and if the house goes up 6% in value you doubled your money

you also pay no taxes on your first 250k in equity when you sell

61967790
I know people who have been waiting for the crash for 10 years lmao

61967831
>>61967790
Good news. The crash is only 2 more weeks away

61967960
>>61963604
Good. More time for me to sell my house and move to Buttfuck Egypt where I will be king of the poors.

61968036
>>61963894
This pisses me off so much. Expensive homes isn’t beneficial for anybody. Why does it matter if a boomers home is worth a ton? So he can brag about his house being worth 1+ million?

61968071
>>61963604
Wagies and renties absolutely can't catch a break! Why can't we just get the hyperdeflation theyve wanted for so long??

61968121
>>61967488
This is what most people don't understand.
Here, housing has been down -10% since 2020. Not great, not that terrible considering rates are up, so one has to take that into account.
Until you realize we had 18% inflation since then.
While not a crash, when taking inflation into account, it's down quite a bit.

61968123
>>61968036
At some point the boomer cashes out. Or takes out a loan against the principal of the house.

You've got a room temperature IQ

61968128
>>61967483
>>61967488
Housing has been historically only about 2% above inflation. But even that's largely an American phenomenon. Housing should be a depreciating asset- a new house ages, requiring more repairs and eventually needs to be demolished. Thanks to political commitments to make housing worth an arm and a leg to acquire it keeps getting propped up

61968133
>>61968123
The boomer will be living in a paid off house and their other expenses will be paid for by social security and a pension. The house will go to their kids

61968208
>>61968128
>Housing should be a depreciating asset
Weeb detecteed

61968606
>>61968128
Of course it should, but that is accelerating the collapse of the ponzi, which a lot interests are going to fight with every mean they have, accelerating state failure and the drift into anarchy
>>61968133
And who is going to take the risk for elder entitlement spending on uncovered debt, which at the same time reduces available resources for security? The BoomerX is trapped between a rock and a hard place. The more the "state" diverts limited resources from security to entitlement, the more rational it becomes to hunt the elder instead of funding the state, and if the BoomerX votes for more security to prevent the economic rationality of them being hunted, they lose 40 years of having paid into ponzi schemes and end dying under bridges

item.title: CHINA SAVES THE MARKETS! — 12 replies — 42.5/hr
item.content:encoded:
CHINA SAVES THE MARKETS!

Open thread • Replies: 12 • Updated: 2026-03-11 13:34 UTC

OP

Thank you Iran and China

Early replies (first 3)

61968278
>>61967950
I told this board since the very beginning of all of this. China can not afford at this point to have their oil supply reduced. They would be utterly fucked.

61968281
>>61968278
Wrong they are doing just fine

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

61968285
why doesn't the US navy just confiscate those ships and distribute the oil where its needed

61968292
>>61968285
this. us should confiscate and give it to israel so they can finally finish this war.

61968313
>>61968292
>>61968285

61968366
>>61967950
Xi won. For the life of me I don't understand why the orange retard has so many sycophants on this board while any praise for the man who has been humiliating him non stop for 6 years now is always small and done through gritted teeth

61968577
>>61968278
1. China doesn't need to buy oil from Iran specifically. China does it because of discounts

2. China is very well positioned to handle higher oil prices. Picrel.

3. In case of disruptions, China has oil stockpiles equivalent to almost 4 months of seaborne imports

61968599
>>61967950
>>61968275
>>61968278
>>61968281
>>61968285
>>61968292
>>61968313
>>61968366
>>61968577
China has 4 months left. You can’t unmine that strip.

61968626
>>61968285

61968672
>>61968599
Russian pipelines and red sea Saudi oil is unlimited

61968698
>>61968672
Saudi oil is not available, russian oil isn’t enough.

item.title: Why is LINK over [insert local whole dollar value resistance] the most reliable BTC DOWN indicator ever? — 10 replies — 40.0/hr
item.content:encoded:
Why is LINK over [insert local whole dollar value resistance] the most reliable BTC DOWN indicator ever?

Open thread • Replies: 10 • Updated: 2026-03-11 13:48 UTC

OP

Why is LINK over [insert local whole dollar value resistance] the most reliable BTC DOWN indicator ever? It might be the most reliable trading market indicator ever. It has well above a 90% strike rate. I have made good money on it but i am afraid to go balls deep because it seems too stupid.

Early replies (first 3)

61968222
>>61968207
Because BTC is Chainlink price control coin

61968239
>>61968222
Checked. But really? That seems absurd. Its got to be so much harder to move the price of BTC than than it would be to just manipulate LINK directly. I need specifics

61968256
>>61968239
By using BTC to suppress the price they can actually accumulate LINK while keeping the price low

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

61968297
>>61968256
They could accumulate LINK by manipulating only LINK too

61968410
>>61968207
If I wasn't such a cowardly retard I would have made it off this by now

61968483
>>61968239
BTC is a dead chain walking.
Everyone knows this since the 2017 hardfork where the banker backed developers took over
Neutered on purpose
Kept alive to keep the space in control. EG keep enough hashpower to stop original bitcoin from respawning
Or suppressing an oracle system that replaces bank's custody and control with trustless, distributed protocols

>That seems absurd
Haven't you gotten the memo yet? Blood sorcerers rule the world.

61968584
I appreciate the input anons, but where are all the fudders? I would like to hear their take on this

61968625
>>61968584
FUD?
Reread my post >>61968483
The banking clans have declared legitimate crypto to be a threat to their control.
Instead of trying to kill it (futile), they have flooded the space with bullshit and scams and wield their imaginary capital to crush anything that is vital and true.

Chainlink will not prosper until the banking houses are ground to dust. Victory is not guaranteed

61968717
>>61968625
So i can continue to just make money shorting BTC forever with no consequences?

61968766
>>61968717
Hypothetically speaking, if it is bank suppression, this means you could just steal money from the banks by shorting BTC, throwing that profit into LINK, rinse and repeat. If they aren’t watching closely and you had a large amount of capital(enough to move the market) you could steal A LOT of money from them.

item.title: Is BTC just a store of value or more? — 13 replies — 22.0/hr
item.content:encoded:
Is BTC just a store of value or more?

Open thread • Replies: 13 • Updated: 2026-03-11 13:15 UTC

OP

People say BTC is boring since it’s not pumping. Is this all it’s gonna be or will it evolve further?

Early replies (first 3)

61967712
>>61964560
Bitcoin is dead

61967714
>>61967712
You mean crypto in general

61967717
>>61967712
So is Dawson

RIP

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

61967721
bitcoin's success as king of the shitcoins convinced all the dinosaur investment firms to finally look at the fucking thing 10+ years later, figure out what's actually useful about the technology, and implement their own proprietary crypto for moving shitloads of money around internationally faster than SWIFT.
They also made high-fee BTC spot etfs to take retard bux.

61967733
>>61967714
Yah and so with altcoins

61967738
>>61964560
Bitcon stores less value than a paper receipt does, at least some places will offer you a full refund if you have a paper receipt backed by their corporate logo, but if people stop caring about collecting digital receipts, its over for bitcon as there is no corporate or government entity backing its "value".

61967741
>>61964560
>Muh store of value
BTC will be relegated to the level of beanie babies and Charizard cards in matter of years.

61967782
>>61964560
Lol cryptotards are going to seethe and make excuses if you mention that of you want to send ten dollars to someone then you need to pay thirty dollars for the transaction to even go through. Fucking lols.

61967783
>>61967717
JewSon

61967842
>>61967741
What about defi on bitcoin?

61967907
>>61964560
Volatility is a feature. LOL, lmao even.

61968568
>>61967907
it can be lol

61968612
>>61964560

item.content:encoded:
IRAN SAYS OIL TO $200 soon

Open thread • Replies: 10 • Updated: 2026-03-11 13:17 UTC

OP

AHHHHHHHH

Early replies (first 3)

61968508
Iran who?

61968512
>>61968491

Based Iran about to pump my bags

61968516
>>61968508
Iran out of oil

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

61968519
Robinhood won’t let me buy oil futures because I can’t answer the stupid questions correctly

61968536
>>61968519
You got IQ filtered lol
And not for the questions, for using Robinhood

61968538
AAAAAAAAAAAAAAA

61968573
>>61968519
Have you tried being less retarded?

61968578
>>61968491
And what dies this do for my shipping stocks FOR said oil?

×100 at least?

61968590
>>61968538
They went from creating national problems to global catastrophes. It’s all astounding.

61968620
>somebody says something
Back to pol

item.title: Today someone said he makes $125k a year and then another person said >what do you do to make $125k >that is a lot >are… — 171 replies — 75.1/hr
item.content:encoded:
Today someone said he makes $125k a year and then another person said >what do you do to make $125k >that is a lot >are…

Open thread • Replies: 171 • Updated: 2026-03-11 11:34 UTC

OP

Today someone said he makes $125k a year and then another person said
>what do you do to make $125k
>that is a lot
>are you in LA?
>why are you lying?
Then I said
>150k is middle class
>no offense, when others don’t believe others, it means they are poor or make less
Then he replied
>150k is not middle class
>60k-80k is middle class
I said
>$125k cannot afford a middle class lifestyle and most jobs paying $125k are in big cities and there is high cost of living
Then he starts lying and saying he is 13
The conversation is just him seething someone makes $125k and arguing that 150k is not middle class.
I tell him due to increased cost of living and wealth gap, even 1m is nothing and 10% of 50% of the consumption and 90% are not doing well.
Why are poor people always seething?
$125k isn’t even middle class. How poor do you guys that guy is? 40k? 70k?
He was really defensive about $150k being middle class.
Do poor people think they are middle class?
This isn’t the first time this has happened.

Early replies (first 3)

61965995
>>61965964
Middle class is self sufficient, it requires an income that can support a household, retirement, children, education(including college), stay at home wife (or) nanny, 2+ modern cars, insurance, 1-3 vacations/yr . I would say 125k-250k depending on area. Lower class normies think they are middle class, middle class is mostly dead. Upper class has excess income after meeting those needs. Lower class requires gov assistance(welfare, healthcare, public school, etc).

61966005
>>61965964
>>$125k cannot afford a middle class lifestyle and most jobs paying $125k are in big cities and there is high cost of living
When people ssay middle class they mean they've got a wife and together they make about 140k or something and can easily afford a suburban house in areas within 2 hours of major cities, especially in southern and midwestern cities like Omaha and Dallas. Your idea of middle class is jetsetting around and banging sloots whenever you want.

61966016
>>61965995
> 1-3 vacations/yr .
1 vacation, maybe dude.
3? Lmao.
I think middle class lifestyle now requires a lot higher income than what people think now.
That wasn’t the first time someone got really defensive with “no, 60-80k is middle class.”
Fucking annoying but good conversation I guess. The ignorance is annoying.

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

61967295
>>61967290
Read up my asshole, retard.

61967301
>>61967290
cool story poorfag
>you were a mistake and you're already replaced by AI

61967337
>>61965964
>>61965995
LOL

61967344
>>61967295
>>61967301
150k is middle class.
Now leave.
/thread.
Everyone else, thanks for the discussion.

61967505
>>61965964
>Why are poor people always seething?
Because we’re broke nigga now hurry up and deflect those boulders, Pee-Lon

61967568
>>61965964
$150k HOUSEHOLD income is middle class. Comfortably.
But middle class in 2025 has a household with two working adults, often a primary income earner making $80k-$90k a year with a partner making $60k-$70k a year.
An individual making $150k a year is wealthy. This isn't really up for debate. The statistics are easy to find.
With $150k a year you can comfortably support a family with a stay at home mom, which in 2025 means you are wealthy. But more likely you are also living in a dual income household where your partner is making anywhere from $70k to $150k (high income earners are more likely to be married to other high income earners), meaning your household income is $220k to $300k.
When your household is bringing in that much it also means you are gonna quickly start accruing income generating assets, meaning overtime your income is only gonna get larger even if your salary remains the same, an obvious sign that you are beyond the typical 'middle class'.
The reality that as a single person on $150k you can only afford what is a typical middle class lifestyle for a dual income household is besides the point. The very fact that you can afford this on a single income means you are considered wealthy. That is just the economic reality today.

61967661
>>61967568
Cool. The average person is so poor.

61967666
>>61967568
> With $150k a year you can comfortably support a family with a stay at home mom
Fuck that shit. I aint letting a girl not work. lmao.

61967673
>>61967666
Fitting digits

61967705
>>61965995
nope, that's upper class. cope

61967708
>>61965964
lmao this faggot really lost an argument and came crying to biz

61967711
>>61966297
>I am from India

61967731
I make $125k before taxes right now. Is that a lot? I always assumed I was a little underpaid since I don't ask for raises or job hop.

61967743
>>61967731
Gross? It's alright. Net? Bretti gud. Equivalent to making 62k twenty years ago. High end of lower middle class.

61967992
>>61965995
I do all that on 40k tho
COL is the only thing that matters

61968004
>>61967215
If you own a home with no debt and you live in an area with low COL, you can save 25-35% of your income for anything you want. You can easily do this on blue collar income.

Cityniggers are the true poors.

61968115
>>61968004
City people that can afford it are not poor,ruralfag

61968117
>>61968004
Lemme guess, your home cost 50k

61968118
>>61967992
You’re fucking retarded.

61968164
>>61966297
Man it's you back again. You've always said previously you're a NEET and your brother is rich and pays for your life. But it can't be much of a life if you waste it baiting people on biz who weren't born at the finish line.

61968189
>>61968164
What are you talking about?

61968190
>>61965964
ocpd namenigger thread.

61968199
>>61968189
Don't play dumb, you didn't earn your wealth

61968202
>>61965964
imagine 125k in yuropoor is like boss level

61968224
>>61968199
> you didn't earn your wealth
Things poor people say.

61968227
>>61968164
> who weren't born at the finish line.
Everyone, when you add their parents and grandparents, had 100 years to make. All the high iq people made it

61968231
>>61968202
But the jobs are even rarer and your work load higher

61968235
Bloomberg literally right now said
>middle income are starting to join the lower income in feeling the pain of rising prices.

61968302
Class is not derived from monthly income level. If you think it is, that's a giveaway that you're working class.

Middle class people own their home outright, no debts, and don't have to worry about work. IE if they lose their job, they could support themselves for at least a full year without incurring a hit to their standard of living, or getting into turmoil.

Middle class people can work fun jobs for low income, and still live middle class lives, because they have their home paid off. Higher middle class will own stocks that provide a stable income for themselves as well as their home.

If you have to work for a living, you are working class. Regardless of what your takehome is.

If not going to work means you lose your home, you're definitely not middle class.

61968307
>too stupid to understand cost of living
Sorry for the people conversing with you

item.title: WTF — 60 replies — 34.3/hr
item.content:encoded:
WTF

Open thread • Replies: 60 • Updated: 2026-03-11 12:06 UTC

OP

YOU SAID TO BUY OIL YOU SAID IRAN WAS GOING TO CLOSE THE STRAIT OF HORMUZ FUCK ALL OF YOU

Early replies (first 3)

61959820
The usa ran out of weapons lol. the strait is still fucked.

61959822
>>61959817
I didn't say that, you listened to someone else, should have listened to me retard

61959823
No refunds my brown friend

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

61960453
>>61960280
Israel is out of interceptors, they don't have a choice but to stop if the US pulls out.

61960510
>>61959817
USA gave up faster than we thought. My bad. I underestimated TACO

61960559
>>61959833
Iran is a Russia/China proxy. We are using all of our missiles in Ukraine/Iran, taking interceptor missiles out of Asia to blow up shitty Chinese drones(assembled in Iran). China is going to make a play on Taiwan soon, the defense industry is too corrupt to increase production. Saw this writing on the wall when Israel started spraying round-up on Syrian fields last year. Trump can’t back out, Israel is giving him a BJ and treating to bite down if he does.

61961565
>>61959833
>what are drones

61966279
>>61959817
Whats in that honey bobo?

61966346
It's funny it's literally being closed now. OP was early once again.

61966543
>>61959817
I've made so much money trading oil perps on Phantom the past two weeks I've ALMOST recovered my losses from shitty BTC longs this year

61967039
https://oilprice.com/Latest-Energy-News/World-News/Oil-Supply-Risks-Mount-as-Iran-Lays-Mines-in-Strait-of-Hormuz.html
>Tehran still possesses roughly 80%–90% of its small naval vessels and mine-laying craft, enabling it to potentially deploy hundreds more mines if it chooses.

61967054
>>61967039
>Updated 19 minutes ago
>US destroys 16 Iranian mine-laying boats
https://www.axios.com/2026/03/10/hormuz-strait-mines-war-trump
Lmao. Oilbaggies.

61967117
>>61967054
Oh boy. This will force Iran to try and lay out as many mines as possible while they still can.

61967177
>>61967117
>still playing chess after being checkmated
sad

61967187
>>61967054
Even if they stop the mines it doesn't matter because they can still missile strike the ships

61967237
>>61967187
>missile
You mean drone. It's a brand new world militarily, and 20k drone can down a tanker.

61967398
>>61966543
>btc longs
why lol. BTC such a simple winning hand - just buy and hodl. i guess people just gotta have a feeling they've outsmarted the consensus.

61967401
>>61967237
just get the us military to escort the tankers

61967443
>>61967401
They'll be sunk, there's a reason the carriers are out in the open ocean where they can maneuver.

61967479
>>61960453
Yeah, but then the choice for Trump is a forever war in Iran or leaving Israel high and dry and then having to hope the Iranians succeed with a decapitation strike on the entire Likud and Mossad at the same time or else whatever blackmail they have on him via Epstein is coming out. So uh I guess enjoy forever war in Iran and look forward to higher oil prices

61967481
>>61967401
>just get the most expensive fleet in the world to constantly go through a 39 km-96 km wide traphole to get droned and missiled to death
Nigga, do you want a modern amerifat version of the battle of the Bismarck Sea?

61967487
I don't get it. Why doesn't USA just tactical nuke the Iranian settlements near the Strait of Hormuz chokepoint?

61967497
Market has been down all fucking day. So much so that most of my stores didn't even want to put in any order or preload. Fucking up my day and pissing off my drivers who then piss me off.

>.t fuel dispatcher

61967498
>>61967487
Because that would release the tactinuke genie (so the ruskies would consider just nuking the ukrainians for example), make the US a pariah state (causing amongst other things a deep global economic depression) and cause a a retarded pursuit of nuclear power around the globe that would most likely result in some utterly disastrous nuclear conflict.

61967503
>>61967497
Tell the stores that /biz/ says oil going to $250

61967510
>>61967497
What, can't price gouge at $85 oil? lol

61967556
>>61967510
Pfff we wholesale ship this shit. It can be $1.50 or $18 we make the same.

61967565
>>61959833
>>61961565
>>61959887
>>61959956
IRGC isn't going to fight unless americans land and americans won't land because we have the fucking sea. IRGC benefits from basically usurping the clerics and taking over the country, with Khamenei Jr. being a puppet.

The guy hasn't even been seen since the 28th so he's probably dead.

61967677
Drain your pool, you have a delivery of crude comming!

61967697
>>61959817
Don't bet against America

61967744
>>61967697
i wont, but ill hope and pray that Persia is the most annoying, costly and drawn out war even if it makes me become poor

61967748
>>61967697
America bets against itself

61968398
>>61959956
By your logic Iran should have surrendered when Trump expected them to. Whoops.

item.title: how do I break out of poverty with no degree at age 34? — 26 replies — 29.9/hr
item.content:encoded:
how do I break out of poverty with no degree at age 34?

Open thread • Replies: 26 • Updated: 2026-03-11 12:59 UTC

OP

how do I break out of poverty with no degree at age 34? I am very high IQ, got a perfect ACT and full ride to a good school, but fucked it all up getting addicted to drugs and Ive only just now finally stopped (1 year sober). So I have the ability to learn or do just about anything mental but I just dont fucking know where to start. My current dead end job waiting tables nets me about 45k a year and I have 15k in savings from the past year but I have no idea where to invest it or what to do with it, its just sitting there

please help out an absolute fucking retard

Early replies (first 3)

61968333
>>61968326
You're "very high IQ" right? You figure it out.

61968336
>>61968326
>So I have the ability to learn or do just about anything mental
you probably ruined your brain with drug abuse -- and you probably weren't all that smart to begin with, considering your retarded ass spent a decade relying on chemicals to make your niggerbrain feel good.

your first step will be losing this undeserved superiority complex.

61968337
>>61968333
thank you

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

61968343
>>61968326
>>61968336
also my advice is to take things slow. figure out what you want to do first, research the job market in depth. if it requires a college degree then i would go slow. college degrees do have a shelf life / expiration date and the job market is absolute shit.

61968345
Become a thoracic surgeon and make 1 mil a year. You can knock out med school requirements in 2 years tops

61968347
Honestly join up to fight for israel and get gibs or kill yourself because you did nothing and ruined your life

61968350
>>61968336
Kek what a midwit. Drug/alcohol abuse doesn’t affect your mental capabilities a lot if you’re young and become sober, unless you abused drugs/alcohol like really fucking hard. Majority of people are just overly cautious.

61968351
>>61968336
>xhe thinks drug addiction is a matter of cognitive or moral strength
sub 30 ACT detected. And I already acknowledged I'm a full on retard in OP.

61968360
>>61968347
killing myself is unironically, definitely the plan. this thread is just a pathetic, last ditch cope

61968364
>>61968350
keep coping, wastoid niggerbrain.
>>61968351
i have a degree and a professional license and i make $150k a year working from home -- and i've only been doing this for 8 years. you're a 34 year old retard fuckup who makes $45k waiting tables.

61968369
>>61968326
Someone needs to edit that image, because I'm a sick fuck that actually enjoys suffering in this world.

https://youtu.be/mesICD6tohw

61968371
>>61968351
>>61968364
>xhe thinks drug addiction is a matter of cognitive or moral strength
it's an appeal to empirical observation and physiognomy. you likely LOOK like someone who would be a 34 year old drug addicted service industry worker. it's a self-fulfilling prophecy for a reason.

61968375
>>61968364
uh oh midwit melty!

61968381
>>61968375
hey faggot im not the one endeavoring to start a degree at 34 and then beg someone like me for an internship when you're 36 fuckin years old. what were you even thinking for the LAST DECADE of your life?

61968397
>>61968381
you know my failed existence has nothing to do with the fact you're just not very bright, right big boy? Or is that concept too much for you? You won at life, just relax and enjoy sitting on top of the bell curve :)

61968411
>>61968397
if you're so smart then why did you need chemicals to feel good... for the past decade of your life?

61968426
>>61968411
Because big brainz are much more inclined to suffer from depression and can't handle being surrounded by cretins like yourself?
All the smarties i know went on drugs at one point or another of their lives, only lukewarm IQ npcs like thyself are happy without getting hooked on some chems.

61968427
>>61968426
Rick and morty type beat

61968434
>>61968364
Guess what, i earn six figures too in a high status profession. The fact that you talk about drugs ”ruining your brain” still reveals you as a midwit.

61968436
I mean, if the best thing you could say of yourself at 34 with no degree is
>I have high IQ
it looks grim ngl

Four roads:
1) Acceptance: you will not make it, you will survive doing menial jobs until you die, it doesn't need to be a lonely road you can start a family, when poor it's better to be in company. Families are strong safety nets for the poor. Maybe you luck out and you marry a well off goblina
2) The miser way. Save every single penny, invest correctly (your high IQ should help you there no?) Some redditors at personal finance did just that and made it. It requires some enormous mental to spend your youth in misery while your peers enjoy their life but it's doable
3) Find a job that requires for you to do almost nothing so you can actually do something productive with your time, like a second job or getting a degree or study for a better job
4) An hero

61968464
>>61968326
>ACT
>full ride to a good school
Not really sure LSU is considered a good school, but ok. On the plus side you have no student debt so you're most of the way there. NGL that fuckup with your full ride was a major oopsie. I went to college on a full ride myself (National Merit+fellowship) and going into life with a degree and no debt made it nearly impossible for me to fail at life.
>I have 15k in savings from the past year
That's not bad for 1 year's worth of savings. Open an account at Schwab or Fidelity (they may have a walk-in office near you, or you can do this from their websites) and put your savings into a Roth IRA and invest them into a S&P 500 fund. Every month or quarter plunk your spare savings into this fund. Or a brokerage fund if you exceed the Roth contribution limits (don't remember what they are, haven't been eligible in decades).

61968495
>>61968426
>doubling down on the 2smart4quittingdrugs

61968522
>>61968326

>high IQ
>still poor somehow

61968529
>>61968522
Idolizing money is also midwittery.

61968543
>>61968529
>christcuck moral compass
whoever filled your niggerbrain with this nonsense is wrong and deceitful. idolizing spending money is for morons. idolizing having money is not, because it allows for the rejection of wageslavery.

61968554
>>61968326
Stop being so arrogant and you might learn something

item.title: There are now more tech workers going from the US to Europe than the other way around — 52 replies — 24.9/hr
item.content:encoded:
There are now more tech workers going from the US to Europe than the other way around

Open thread • Replies: 52 • Updated: 2026-03-11 11:46 UTC

OP

Early replies (first 3)

61952823
>>61952797
is this another one of those tricks where India becomes Southern Asian becomes Eastern Europe?

61952844
>>61952797
Ok, but why are both decreasing?

61952879
>>61952844
it looks to me that there are less Tech workers in general, the ones going back to Europe probably couldn't get a job in the US

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

61956857
>>61956664
This is cultural. Americans are encouraged to spend 115% of their income while European culture values security thru saving.
>>61952797
I am a U.S. tech worker in Europe. It isn't bad if you already have money from America to buy a house in Europe. I get literally over 2 months off per year between all the PTO and holidays. Pay is about 1/3 what I made in America but it's WFH at least and no niggers at all near me.

61956859
>>61956857
>no niggers at all near me
Don't say that in 4chan. Anons will call you a liar and tell Europe is majority African.

61956861
>>61956668
Spotify
Revolut
Various other fintech companies
Video game companies are doing well (except ubisoft)

61956865
Oh yea the other big deal in European tech is the desire to move away from U.S. based tech.
This will drive a huge boom in E.U. tech and coding jobs for 15+ years.
Americans really underestimate how petty and spiteful Europeans are. The people I work with don't even want to use U.S. clouds or Windows at all.

61956870
>>61956865
Any ways you can think to profit off of Linux? I feel it is finally reaching normal people, irregardless of Europeans

61956885
>>61952797
>Europoor cope.
Just ask an AI what the economic outlook is for the next 10 years for the US. Then for any Europoor country.

61956888
>>61956870
Learn linux.
Charge companies $$$ to install open source systems and maintain them.
Remember, you are charging them for the labor and not the software itself.

61956914
>>61956870
>>61956888
German government is again trying to switch their enterprise environments to Linux from MS.
So yea, but you need to speak German. But in general there is an uptick in E.U. demand for Linux experts...

61956916
>>61956885
>just ask the jewish USA produced chat bots what the jews programmed them to say
Nah. But they vary wildly week to week anyway. Grok is usually pro-USA but lately admits the only advantage to the USA is money at higher personal risk to crime and violence and imprisonment etc.

61956926
>>61956865
>oh hey we’re going to annex a huge territory belonging to an european nation while insulting in white house the leader of another european nation that is currently under threat of annexation in a war
>wtf why are they not trusting us anymore?? What spiteful creatures!

The mind of a burger is truly an interesting one.

61956941
>>61952901
europeans cant afford to save but do
americans cant afford to spend but do

61956988
>>61956926
You have to understand Amero-Jewish culture. It's not personal, it's just business. America's vicious jewish culture of fucking people over and jewing them out of their money and property doesn't allow for holding grudges.
Anyway, yea Europeans have diverged massively from Americans and that is the basic root of this schism and it is pathetic to watch Mexico Rubio come grovel to the Europeans and be like "hey guys we're still cool right? Our shared history and Christianity." Mesnwhile he's a spic from Cuba and 90% of Europeans are secular atheists.

61959430
>>61956988
Lol such a true post it ended the thread.

61959479
>>61956988
These fucking rural schizo yahoos like Vance coming here to lecture us boils my blood like nothing else

61959509
>>61956786
>he doesn't know...

61959529
>>61952797
Well, having nearly 10 weeks of comfy yearly paid leave does that

61959554
>>61956849
>the goal
Yeah that is the goal, but you didn't say it's the goal you said Europe is "unconquered" which is obviously not true, retard

61960952
>>61959479
That's your European elitism and snobbishness. In America white trash garbage like Vance can rise to such power that he can be richer and more powerful than any European even to the point your aristocratic old money elites have to listen to him call you bitch ass faggots to your faces.

61960963
>>61952797
Makes sense. Usa has no growth. Now Europe will have growth.

61961283
>>61959529
Coulda just been a teacher for all of those benefits

61961513
Local Europeans are delusional, hubris awaits them.

61965098
>>61952797
And all of them are Indians.

61965105
>>61956794
Australia

61968056
>>61960963
USA has seen immense growth this century while Europe stagnated. They tried to bring in Moslems but none of them have jobs so they contribute nothing to GDP and just get like $10,000 a month and free apartments to take care of their 3 wives and 17 kids.

61968099
>>61952823
eastern europe was never as shit as india

61968180
>>61956794
every continent besides asia got fucked in the ass by europe

61968241
>>61968099
Even in the worst days of the post Soviet collapse in the 1990s Eastern Europe was 100x better than India in terms of clean quality of life for normal people.
>>61968180
Asia got fucked plenty, read a history book ya dumb goon.

61968258
>>61968241
the "entire continent" fuck off and read the statement properly

61968284
>>61968056
The only reason why europe stagnated was because of Putin goinh retarded. None of this chud crap. Without Putin, retarded americans couldn’t compete with europe in any way.

61968329
>>61968284
this
it's all putler's fault

item.title: WFH CHADS REPORT IN — 87 replies — 22.8/hr
item.content:encoded:
WFH CHADS REPORT IN

Open thread • Replies: 87 • Updated: 2026-03-11 10:02 UTC

OP

Let's all laugh at the wagies who have to pay insane amounts for gas to get to work kek

Early replies (first 3)

61953886
>>61953855
Imagine spending half your days pay worth of money just to get to work and back lmao

61954053
>>61953855
antisemitic wfh antizog antimiga chads will inherit the earth

61954077
>>61953886
>half
You mean full for minimum wage chads, don’t forget about rent and bills too.

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

61960265
>>61960254
I'm a retard
>What industry
It's not in a hospital I meant, I manage several healthcare facilities
Pay is significantly better than what I got paid at my shitty small CPA practice with my cunt post-menopause boss but it's really not a great position

61960308
>>61959961
I'm just applying to everything now, got an assessment with the National Safety Council, they've got a couple different positions open but mostly just looking through support related jobs on LinkedIn. If I nail a $40,000+ a year position that will bring me back to six figures.

61960341
I make 250k a year WFH and I barely do any work. Is anyone else absolutely loving life right now?

61960799
>>61960341
What industry?

61961018
>>61953855
I was WFH today, office wagie tomorrow...
Hybrid bros... Why can't they let us go...

61961897
Implying I don’t dare evade the metro

61962326
>>61960341
im at 120k + benefits and its awesome, can't imagine how nice 250k/year is

what are you investing in?

61962422
>>61959577
The main purpose of female employment is to prevent them from having babies.

61963454
Has anyone here got a WFH in 2025/6? Most seem to be hybrid with full office required during probation

61963700
>>61963454
Yea I snagged a WFH bank job doing cybersecurity end of 2025. Technically we all work at the office but managers tell their teams where to work and my boomer manager is lazy and won't go to the office basically ever so neither does anyone else on his team.

61963769
Anyone else ride an e-bike?

61964574
I have been WFH for two years. For a long time I was playing tons of video games and working maybe 5 hours per week, kek. Now there's a lot more work to do though, but I still only work maybe 20 hours per week on average. The first half of every day I dedicate to reading news, drinking coffee and shitting. I actually feel bad about it as I want to do meaningful work but since we live in clown world I don't care. I was actually the highest performer by far in previous shit jobs like callcenters.

61965044
>>61954585
Came here to post this.

61965065
>>61954976
I just hired someone (WFH) from LinkedIn, I made a post asking for particular skills and he saw it and had a job the next week.
All social media is cancer but LinkedIn does improve work prospects unfortunately.

61965110
>>61964574
I've been WFH for seven years now, a non-coding job watching over a SAAS application. Most days I just fuck around but for example this week I have lots of work. So I fucked around all morning, did nothing during work hours, but now I am bored so I am gonna put in around 4 hours of real work until I feel sleepy. That's probably going to carry me for a couple days.

The flexibility is great its basically like being a full paid NEET if you have a minimum of willpower to actually strategically do work when absolutely needed. I actually get great ratings and raises every year

61965143
WFH healthcare Epic guy here. Have an offer to consult for big bucks, but it will require I leave my home periodically to travel. What do?

61965186
>>61965143
dinners with american boomers is the absolutely most painful part of my WFH job but it hasn't happened in over a year now. I'd say its worth it

61965203
>>61965186
Leaving a full time position for a short contract for the first time scares me, but when you're good (I am) the work keeps coming. Think im going for it.

61965295
Neet reporting in!
0 work per week!

61965410
>>61965110
Very comfy and based anon.

61965438
>>61958532
Are you me, lmao. I scroll through a lot of maps when I'm bored.

61965873
>>61954356
Holy comfy wtf
How much do you get paid and what's your job?

61965895
>>61958588
>>61959006
Kino, I have a mild secret sex fetish

61966734
>>61953855
>Let's all laugh at the wagies who..
Silly wagie, don't act like you're better than the rest of the cucks. If you're a wagie in any shape or form you are a lesser lifeform compared by default, to the NEET elite. Wagens truly say the darndest things.

61966978
>>61965203
Contract came in, no travel after all

61967069
>>61953855
Anyone else have a low 6 figure wfh job but hate it? Been at my place 4 years and worked my way up. Have a 2 year old and expecting another one. Not leaving it anytime soon but it’s starting to drain my soul. It’s comfy but has busy seasons and they blow. Anyone else feeling the golden cuffs?>>61953855

61967221
>>61959314
>Be careful
>When you are literally fulfilling your genetic perogative
No thanks, i will impregnate my wife on the clock as much as possible.

61967504
I work 2 jobs, one is full remote, but the other is 4 days in office, one from home. I've been actively looking to replace that one with a second full remote job.

61968042
>>61965895
>having penis in vagina sex with your wife is fetish material
Do zoomies really?

61968154
>>61954162
i just do the this when i'm not in the mood for work

item.title: Polkadot - First halving — 41 replies — 15.9/hr
item.content:encoded:
Polkadot - First halving

Open thread • Replies: 41 • Updated: 2026-03-11 11:17 UTC

OP

https://polkadothalving.com/ 10 more days. https://www.parity.io/blog/refining-polkadots-economic-architecture-issuance-DOT-DAP-and-network-adjustments
https://x.com/Polkadot/status/2028482336463945765
"
Polkadot’s economic upgrade begins rolling out in 10 days.

Enhanced tokenomics increases DOT scarcity and introduces new governance and staking mechanisms.

▸ DOT supply capped at 2.1B
▸ Emissions cut 53.6%
▸ Unbonding from 28 days to 24-48 hours
"

Early replies (first 3)

61933757
Guys?

61933779
>>61932834
10000$ @ 6.5
i dont sell my dotty

61936705
Guys?

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

61942667
>>61942662
Well... that's an unsolvable problem, isn't it? Maybe cognitively reframe from being a retard into being inexperienced? Also, ask yourself "What does me saying I'm a retard protect me from?", have you ever thought about that labeling yourself as "stupid" is actually in order to protect yourself from failure?

61945303
100$ end of bull run

61948226
https://polkadothalving.com/ 7 more days

61948752
>>61945303
75

61948922
>>61948752
Nah man, I won't sell you my 1 DOT for 75 apples. Best I can do is 150

61948977
>>61945303
The bull run has been over for months

61948983
>>61948922
75
and israel down down

61948998
>>61948977
100$ end of bull run

>>61948983
Wow, these antisemites are self reporting nowadays. Jannies!!! Ban him! He dares to say something bad about Israel. NOT ALLOWED. UNACCEPTABLE !!! He's a NAZI. Jannies, help. We've got a true nazi over here.

61951499
https://polkadothalving.com/ 5 more days

61951573
>>61951499
very good....i hope 3$ in april
75 in 2 year

61951605
>>61951573

61956435
https://polkadothalving.com/ 4 more days

61959501
100$ end of bull run

61960135
>>61956435
>>61959501

All the oilfags and metalfags are missing easy money here

61962610
https://polkadothalving.com/ 3 more days

61962631
>>61942667
I did some research and boughted, fren

61962633
>>61962631
Oh? What convinced you?

61962637
>>61962631
Also, 1 recommendation. Stake on Bifrost or Hydration. Or through the official staking dashboard https://staking.polkadot.cloud/#/overview. Don't use exchanges, they give you peanuts.

61962645
https://x.com/21shares_us/status/2031028768001704295
"
$TDOT is the first-ever @Polkadot
ETP in the US, now live and #NasdaqListed.
"

https://x.com/Polkadot/status/2031281093635129822
"
It’s official.
The first Polkadot U.S. ETF is live and trading on Nasdaq.
"

picrel

61962682
>>61962633
DOT IS GOING TO THE MOON

61962686
https://www.21shares.com/en-us/products-us/tdot 11.3m$ of inflows in the first day. They're also considering staking at some point.

>>61962682
You earlier said "I did some research and boughted". What were your findings? What convinced you?

61962688
>>61962682
>DOT IS GOING TO THE MOON
100$ end of bull run

61962693
https://ng.investing.com/etfs/tdot-nasdaq

61962715
i dont sell, i dont care

61962726
>>61962715
>i dont sell, i dont care
I DOT buy, I DOT care

61965530
DOT? That thing is put into my brakes?

61966637
back to $1?

61968186
>>61966637
>I DOT buy, I DOT care
>i don't sell, i don't care

61968274
This crypto is 1.50.
The fuck?

Not a stock!

OP

WHO THE FUCK KEEPS PUMPING THIS SHIT

Early replies (first 3)

61963811

61963820
>>61963788
Me.

>>61963811
/thread

61963866
>>61963788

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

61964065
>>61964042
3/3 was the last blood moon this cycle, get with the times old man, it's up only until 2028.

61964079
>>61964042
It's all extremely clear if you have even a remedial understanding of TA.

61964089
>>61964007
other way around. crying first then rubbing hands

61964097
>>61964042
Bobo opens shorts, shorts cause market to drop, bobo closes shorts, causes market to rise, mumu buys the dip, bobo opens new shorts, rinse and repeat.

61964107
>>61964036
It doesn't affect the US (the only market that matters)

61964124
Demons

61964180
>>61963969
True. The market still thinks this is another 12 day war.

61964186
>>61964180
because it is you stupid shit, yesterday trump literally said it was nearly complete

61964188
>>61964026
>5 years no stop of dumps and crabdumps

We just had an ath in october.

61964212
>>61964186
That's what the orange nigger said, it's obvious everything went out of his control.

61964216
>>61963788
Why would I stop buying? Even if the war goes on for years the market will just keep going up with small dips here and there. I am here to make money long term. Not short term gambler highs.

61964226
>>61964212
>DURR THE WAR ISNT ENDING BECAUSE I SAID SO
actually fucking delusional, I guess the price of oil is still $120 in your mind. the market is already beyond recovering

61964243
Bitcoin was in a bear market prior to any issues with Iran. Even if it is cooling off (its not, iran is bombing at an even higher frequency) everything is even more bearish than it was before it all even started.

61964249
>ultra bad PR when they killed those schoolgirls meaning even less support for the war than usual
>high oil price fucks everyone so they'll just focus on that and liberate the strait
>kikes and their golem both say they already won
>orange nigger doesn't want dow under 50k
It's just up at this point until some new epstein distraction then AI bubble collapse.
Yes I panic sold the first day but luckily bought back cheaper.

61964259
>>61963788
the kikes that have been dumping have been killed by iranian missiles
the true bullrun can now resume

61964268
>>61964259
>the true bullrun can now resume
I'm so tired

61964312
>>61963788
its the agents currency now

61964492
>>61964188
We literally did not
Did you forget we printed like half of all the USD that has ever existed since 2021?
It was an ath in fake, gay, globohomo normie valuation

61965010
>>61964186
>yesterday trump literally said

I want you to picture for a moment the probability of him admitting that he fucked up and things aren't actually under control. If you actually believe he won't just go all "mission accomplished" the way Bush did after six weeks in Iraq, there's something wrong with you

61965024
>>61965010
why are the markets green and oil is cheap now then you stupid fucking idiot.

61965059
>>61965024
Because retail believed that shit, you fucking nigger.

61965066
>>61965059
>Major financial institutions are retail now
lmao, you dont see companies panicking or laying off anybody. nvidia just ejaculated a couple billion into another AI firm. everything is back to normal.

61965082
>>61965066
repeat that last sentence out loud

61965675
>>61964492
Even adjusted for inflation, bitcoin ath was on october 6

61965683
>>61965082

61965857
>>61963937

61965967
>>61964259

61967725
>>61965857
Yeah, 20% of supply was cut off, this is totally normal and happens twice a month. Retard.

61967737
>>61967725
we're bypassing hormuz you stupid shit. there is no oil crisis

61968021

>>61954004

61954034

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

61957442
USA forced regime change on Iran with all the bad consequences that followed, then gave Saddam the precursors for mustard gas and egged him on to go to war with Iran. 200k+ Iranians died in this war.
>but they just hate our freedumbs!
USA has become comically villanous, a bad shadow of its former self...

61957443
>>61954004
your short time pain for their long time gains goy!

61957454
>>61954029
it was staged

61957470
>>61954918

61957577

61958149
>>61956054

61958261
>>61954004
Why does he write like an absolute retard, can Americans explain this to me?

61958269
>>61956866
Sorry, brother, teenage love is the only true form of romantic love. Once you hit that age when the first question a female asks you is "what is your profession, it's over :)

61958280
Can't we gang up to wipe out israel and live in peace with islamist?

61958799
>>61957320
Republicans don't care about fiscal responsibility or prices being low, or anything else really. They just want someone to get up on the podium and be a mirror to their ideology, regardless of what the actual outcome is

61958816
>>61957454
This. It's all fake and gay. Israel literally owns Hollywood

61958832
>>61957296
China just has to do literally nothing in order to win against the US. Ideal world they continue to invest in renewables and infrastructure to help then rebound from global currency meltdowns, and subsequently would give them some isolation from oil price volatility as well. The US is having the equivalent of a brain hemmhorage, it's not long until all executive function is completely dissolved

61958966
>>61957296
>retarded leadership
more like retarded citizens
burgers are fucking golems who can't be trusted and will make this mistake again in the future

61959102
>>61954004
Thankfully, i am currently driving a company issued vehicle and fuel card for most of my driving.

61959300
>>61954140
Everyone knew it would happen. Bibi didn't give a fuck and gave Trump the order anyway

61960740
>>61956276
It was a nothingburger. You forget about the heartbreak and opportunity cost. Benefits did not outweigh the negative consequences at all.

61960852
>>61954004
Having no more Islamic Republic is good for America and for the world.

61960960
>>61958261
>Why does he write like an absolute retard, can Americans explain this to me?
DJT doesn't speak english. He speaks english words, but not grammar, syntax, or meaning.

he spouts vague chain of consciousness word salad, which other people are free to interpret according to their own epistemic lens. This makes him everyone to everybody, and also results in success usually since smarter people than him take his nonsense and filter it into actionable concepts that yield results.

as to whether or not he's actually retarded, we will never know. He doesn't speak english, so it's impossible to judge his intellect. Though the simple failure to learn language is itself a strong sign of retardation. So It's likely he speaks like a retard simply because he is a retard.

61961091
>>61960852

61961113
>>61961091
To be quite honest, I don't want Islam just as I don't want Judaism, or Christianity. I want people who outgrew this madness - brains. Not beliefs.

61962279
>>61961113
>I want people who outgrew this madness - brains. Not beliefs.
Your tone indicates you believe in the dollar, so no sincerity from you.

61964449
